2605.30000.title: Cookie-Bench: Continuous On-screen Key Interaction Evaluation for Web Generation
2605.30000.paper_summary: Front-end web code has become a core product surface for every frontier LLM release, yet evaluating these interactive applications at development speed remains costly because human-judged leaderboards like Arena do not scale. Existing automated proxies typically lean on reference implementations, test suites, or rigid checklists, and tend to miss the reasoned synthesis a human reviewer performs over a live session. We articulate a new evaluation regime that is simultaneously reference-free, autonomously driven, and holistically reasoned, and instantiate it through two artifacts. \textbf{\dataname} is an 11-domain, 54-leaf, 1,000-query WebDev benchmark spanning both static-presentation and interactive-application tasks, balanced across three difficulty tiers and three target-language groups, with briefs rewritten to resist recall from circulated prompts. \textbf{\framename}, grounded in Flavell's metacognitive monitoring, separates evidence accumulation from judgment across three stages: Static Perception forms a first impression from passive observation; Agent-Driven Interaction explores the application autonomously while capturing continuous screen video, audio, and per-step screenshots; Dynamic Scoring issues holistic functionality and aesthetics verdicts with structured failure attribution only after the evidence chain is complete. On \dataname, \framename aligns closely with expert human ratings while surfacing substantial headroom across 13 frontier LLMs on interactive web generation. \noindenthttps://anonymous.4open.science/r/Cookie-3CE/
2605.30000.paper_summary_zh: 前端網頁代碼已成為每個前沿 LLM 發布的核心產品表面，但以開發速度評估這些互動應用仍然成本高昂，因為像 Arena 這樣的人為評判排行榜無法擴展。現有的自動化代理通常依賴於參考實現、測試套件或僵化的檢查清單，並且往往無法捕捉人類審查者在實時會議中所進行的理性綜合。我們提出了一種新的評估體系，該體系同時不依賴參考、由自主驅動並進行整體推理，並通過兩個工件來實現。 \textbf{\dataname} 是一個涵蓋 11 個領域、54 個葉節點和 1,000 個查詢的 WebDev 基準，涵蓋靜態展示和互動應用任務，並在三個難度層級和三個目標語言組之間進行平衡，簡報經過重寫以抵抗來自流通提示的回憶。 \textbf{\framename} 以 Flavell 的元認知監控為基礎，將證據積累與判斷分為三個階段：靜態感知從被動觀察中形成第一印象；代理驅動互動自主探索應用，同時捕捉持續的屏幕視頻、音頻和每步截圖；動態評分在證據鏈完整後，僅發出整體功能和美學的判決，並進行結構化的失敗歸因。在 \dataname 上，\framename 與專家人類評分緊密對齊，同時在 13 個前沿 LLM 的互動網頁生成上顯示出可觀的提升空間。 \noindenthttps://anonymous.4open.science/r/Cookie-3CE/
2605.30000.author: Haoyue Yang et.al.
2605.30000.authors: Haoyue Yang, Zhangxiao Shen, Fan Ding, Hangting Lou, Yifeng Kou, Haoqing Yu, Jingyao Li, Zhengfan Wu, Siqi Bao, Jing Liu, Hua Wu
